title: Bwindi Primate Odyssey
shortDescription: A deep dive into the ancient forests of Bwindi for a once-in-a-lifetime gorilla encounter.
description: Embark on an extraordinary journey into the Bwindi Impenetrable Forest. This tour is designed for those seeking a profound connection with nature, specifically focusing on the majestic mountain gorillas and the unique biodiversity of the Albertine Rift.

storyline.text: The trek begins at dawn, with the mist clinging to the ancient ferns of Bwindi.
The moment of contact is silent and sacred, as you sit just meters away from a silverback.

activities.title: Gorilla Habituation
activities.description: Spend 4 hours with a family under habituation for an extended study.

activities.title: Batwa Cultural Trail
activities.description: Learn ancient forest survival skills from the original inhabitants of the forest.

accommodation.title: Cloud's Mountain Gorilla Lodge
accommodation.description: High-altitude luxury with individual stone cottages and private butler service.

meals.title: Organic Farm-to-Table
meals.description: Meals prepared using local ingredients sourced directly from the Kisoro community.

bookingTips: Gorilla permits are limited to 8 per family per day; book at least 6 months in advance.
Bring waterproof hiking boots with good grip for slippery jungle terrain.
Gardening gloves are highly recommended for grabbing vines during the trek.

sections.content: Bwindi is more than a forest; it's a living relic of the Pleistocene era.
